original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out,
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        data_out <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end
end

endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out,
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            data_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            data_out <= data_in;
        end
    end

endmodule
